name: claude-model-changer
description: Automatically routes tasks to the appropriate Claude model (haiku/sonnet/opus) based on complexity analysis. 30 task categories, multi-language (EN/HU/DE), LLM-fallback learning, anomaly detection, adaptive weights. Saves 40-60% on mixed workloads. v3.5.0 adds smart auto-sync of 5 external Claude Skill repos (everything-claude-code, mattpocock/skills, ui-ux-pro-max-skill, awesome-claude-skills, open-design) on every session start, in addition to the existing karpathy sync.
